'''thowadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucarpic|eucarpic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucarpic|eucarpic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thowadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowadithi|thowadithi]] || [[word:thowadiji|thowadiji]] || [[word:thowadishi|thowadishi]] || [[word:thowadiki|thowadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowaduthuthu|thowaduthuthu]] || [[word:thowadujuju|thowadujuju]] || [[word:thowadushushu|thowadushushu]] || [[word:thowadukuku|thowadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowaduthu|thowaduthu]] || [[word:thowaduju|thowaduju]] || [[word:thowadushu|thowadushu]] || [[word:thowaduku|thowaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadufthuf|thowadufthuf]] || [[word:thowadufjuf|thowadufjuf]] || [[word:thowadufshuf|thowadufshuf]] || [[word:thowadufkuf|thowadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowadethe|thowadethe]] || [[word:thowadeje|thowadeje]] || [[word:thowadeshe|thowadeshe]] || [[word:thowadeke|thowadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowadothotho|thowadothotho]] || [[word:thowadojojo|thowadojojo]] || [[word:thowadoshosho|thowadoshosho]] || [[word:thowadokoko|thowadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadotho|thowadotho]] || [[word:thowadojo|thowadojo]] || [[word:thowadosho|thowadosho]] || [[word:thowadoko|thowadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadofthof|thowadofthof]] || [[word:thowadofjof|thowadofjof]] || [[word:thowadofshof|thowadofshof]] || [[word:thowadofkof|thowadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfthĂŻf|thowadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfjĂŻf|thowadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfshĂŻf|thowadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfkĂŻf|thowadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thowadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thowadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thowadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thowadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfthĂŻf|thowadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfjĂŻf|thowadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfshĂŻf|thowadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfkĂŻf|thowadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfthĂŻf|thowadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfjĂŻf|thowadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfshĂŻf|thowadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowadĂŻfkĂŻf|thowadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowadĂŠthĂŠ|thowadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thowadĂŠjĂŠ|thowadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thowadĂŠshĂŠ|thowadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thowadĂŠkĂŠ|thowadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowadathatha|thowadathatha]] || [[word:thowadajaja|thowadajaja]] || [[word:thowadashasha|thowadashasha]] || [[word:thowadakaka|thowadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadatha|thowadatha]] || [[word:thowadaja|thowadaja]] || [[word:thowadasha|thowadasha]] || [[word:thowadaka|thowadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadafthaf|thowadafthaf]] || [[word:thowadafjaf|thowadafjaf]] || [[word:thowadafshaf|thowadafshaf]] || [[word:thowadafkaf|thowadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thowadasha|thowadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowadshĂ«sha|thowadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowadrosha|thowadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowadmusha|thowadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowadyasha|thowadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowadnkshĂ«sha|gothowadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowadnkrosha|gothowadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowadnkmusha|gothowadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowadnkyasha|gothowadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thowawadasha|thowawadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowawadshĂ«sha|thowawadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowawadrosha|thowawadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowawadmusha|thowawadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowawadyasha|thowawadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowawadnkshĂ«sha|gothowawadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowawadnkrosha|gothowawadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowawadnkmusha|gothowawadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowawadnkyasha|gothowawadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thewĂŠdasha|thewĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thewĂŠdshĂ«sha|thewĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thewĂŠdrosha|thewĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thewĂŠdmusha|thewĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thewĂŠdyasha|thewĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothewĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gothewĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothewĂŠdnkrosha|gothewĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothewĂŠdnkmusha|gothewĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothewĂŠdnkyasha|gothewĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thowfadasha|thowfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowfadshĂ«sha|thowfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowfadrosha|thowfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowfadmusha|thowfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowfadyasha|thowfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowfadnkshĂ«sha|gothowfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowfadnkrosha|gothowfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowfadnkmusha|gothowfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowfadnkyasha|gothowfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
